passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been set successfully. Please sign in with your new credentials.
passwordRequirements: Password must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
passwordRequirementsShort: At least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character.
onboardingDescription: Choose how you want to secure your account. A passkey lets you sign in with biometrics or a security key. You can also set a traditional password instead.
passkeySetupLater: You can set up a passkey later from Security settings.
passkeyMandatoryDesc: Set up a passkey (fingerprint, face ID, or security key) to secure your account. This is required for administrators.
passkeyOptionalDesc: Set up a passkey to sign in with biometrics or a security key instead of your password. You can also do this later from Security settings.
passwordLoginDisabled: Password login is disabled. You are using passkey authentication.
passkeyWarning: Once you register a passkey, username/password login will be permanently disabled for your account.
existingPasskeyReplaced: An existing passkey from the same provider was replaced.
completeSignInPasskey: Use your passkey to complete sign-in.
avatarTooLarge: Image must be less than 1 MB
avatarInvalidType: Only PNG and JPEG images are supported
